calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantpapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner She Vi Fon present in pro per for self and with Co-Petitioner Li Fang Tan (minor's mother) for minor Jian Hong Kuang, and with Cantonese Interpreter William Guan.

Parties and Interpreter were placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Nme to: She Vi Kuang and change of Minor's Name to: Jeffrey Kuang.
Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
